title: E-Waste Management Process in Mangalore
description: A flowchart illustrating the lifecycle of electronic waste management, from consumer disposal to final processing, as implemented in Mangalore's municipal system.
relationships: Consumer disposes of e-waste at a collection point -> Collected by authorized agent -> Transported to a segregation facility -> Components are separated -> Sent to specialized recyclers for metal recovery, plastic processing, and safe disposal of hazardous materials -> Recovered materials re-enter the manufacturing cycle
